meta.title: Reviewlico
meta.description: Drop-in React review components for any app. Install with one CLI command.

hero.sub: Copy production-ready ReviewForm and ReviewList components directly into your project — no black-box SDK, no lock-in.

features.title: Everything your review pipeline needs
features.subtitle: From CLI to dashboard, every layer is built for developers who care about what goes into production.

items.title: Copy, don't import
items.description: npx @reviewlico/cli add ReviewForm copies the full component source into your project — you own the file, you control every pixel, forever.

items.title: Plain CSS or Tailwind — your call
items.description: Choose BEM + CSS custom properties for zero-framework overhead, or ship the Tailwind dark-theme preset with animations included.

items.title: Auto-configures for Next.js and Vite
items.description: The CLI detects your framework and Tailwind setup on first run, setting the right env var prefixes automatically.

items.title: Multi-product support built in
items.description: Pass externalProductId to any component and reviews are automatically scoped — one account, many products, no data mixing.

items.title: Approve, reject, stay in control
items.description: A private dashboard lets you moderate reviews, manage team members, and generate API keys — without touching the codebase.

items.title: Keys shown once, stored as a hash
items.description: Your raw API key is displayed exactly once on creation; only the SHA-256 hash is ever persisted — no plaintext secrets in a database.

plain.title: Plain CSS variant
plain.description: Imports a single review-components.css file at your app root. Zero Tailwind dependency. Ideal for projects that already have their own CSS setup.

tailwind.title: Tailwind variant
tailwind.description: Utility classes throughout — no external stylesheet. Fully tree-shaken. Works out of the box with any Tailwind v3 or v4 project.

howItWorks.title: From zero to embedded in minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: No SDK to pin, no iframe to fight. Just your own components talking to a clean API.

steps.title: Create your account
steps.description: Register, verify your email, and create your first organization. Generate an API key — shown once.

steps.title: Run CLI init
steps.description: The CLI detects your framework and Tailwind setup automatically. Pick a style variant and you're configured.

steps.title: Add a component and ship
steps.description: Copy ReviewForm or ReviewList into your project, set two env vars, and drop the JSX anywhere in your app.

cta.headline: One command away from social proof.
cta.sub: Create an account, generate an API key, and run the CLI — you'll have a working review form in your project before your next commit.

security.title: Security
security.intro: Reviewlico is designed around short-lived access tokens, refresh-token cookies, and explicit org-level access controls.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.body: Clients authenticate with bearer access tokens. Session renewal uses an httpOnly refresh token cookie so refresh tokens are never exposed to client-side JavaScript.

apiKey.title: API key handling
apiKey.body: Organization API keys are generated on demand and shown once at creation time. Treat the returned key as a secret and store it in your own vault or environment manager.

https.title: HTTPS only
https.body: Production deployments are expected to run over HTTPS for all auth and API traffic. Secure cookie attributes should be enabled in production environments.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to manage organizations, API keys, and invitations.
login.errorUnverified: Please verify your email before logging in.
login.errorDefault: Unable to log in right now.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start with email verification, then create your first organization.
register.successMessage: Check your inbox. We sent you a verification email.
register.errorExists: An account with that email already exists.
register.errorDefault: Unable to create your account right now.

verifyEmail.title: Email verification
verifyEmail.success: Email verified! You can now log in.
verifyEmail.expired: Link expired. A new verification email has been sent.
verifyEmail.error: Something went wrong while verifying your email.

orgs.title: Organizations
orgs.subtitle: Manage your workspaces, members, and API keys.
orgs.empty: You're not part of any organization yet.

orgDetail.title: Organization
orgDetail.pending: You don't currently have access to this organization. This can happen if your invitation is still pending.

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: Generate a new API key for this organization.
apiKey.confirmBody: Generating a key creates a new secret. Continue only if you are ready to store it now.
apiKey.warning: This key will only be shown once. Copy it now.
apiKey.generatedState: Key generated in this session. Store it securely.
apiKey.forbiddenError: Only organization owners or admins can generate or rotate API keys.

invite.title: Invite a member
invite.userNotFoundError: This user doesn't have a Reviewlico account yet. Ask them to sign up first, then send the invite again.
invite.forbiddenError: Only organization owners or admins can invite members to this organization.

products.title: Products
products.description: Create and manage products tied to this organization.
products.empty: No products yet. Create one to start collecting product-level reviews.
products.createError: Unable to create product right now.
products.updateError: Unable to update product right now.
products.deleteError: Unable to delete product right now.
products.pageHint: Products are managed on this dedicated page to keep organization settings focused.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.empty: No reviews yet. Once customers submit reviews they will appear here.
reviews.confirmApproveBody: This review will be visible to the public.
reviews.confirmRejectBody: This review will be hidden from public display.
reviews.moderationError: Unable to update review status right now.
reviews.pageHint: Moderate and view all reviews for this organization.

integrate.title: Integration Guide
integrate.subtitle: Set up Reviewlico components in your project.
integrate.apiKeyDescription: Generate an API key from the organization page, then use it as an environment variable in your project.
integrate.cliDescription: Run the following commands in your project directory.
integrate.envDescription: Add these to your project's environment file.
integrate.usageDescription: Import and drop components anywhere in your app.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Review metrics for your organization.
analytics.pageHint: Overview of review metrics for this organization.
analytics.trendsNoData: No trend data for the selected period.

invitation.title: You've been invited
invitation.subtitle: Respond to this invitation to continue.
